conservative.name: Owl of Judgement
conservative.requirements: 8 favour. You must have a piece of food an owl would like to eat

success.description: A shadowy owl settles on your should and process to advise you in a voice that only you can hear. The owl's observations add to Charm, Discipline, Guile, Intimidate, and Leadership checks. The owl stays with you until the end of the episode or sunrise, whichever comes first

As above and, if you also have the Owl of Wisdom on your shoulder, your Willpower and Toughness are each increased by 1 while in the presence of those you know to be lawbreakers, oathbreakers, or destroyers of knowledge

sigmarsComet.description: You may recharge your Owl of Wisdom blessing
